name: Hartygang

vessel.photoCaption: Hartygang at anchor — 2024 EdgeWater 230 CC, single 300 HP Yamaha.

advisorChips: Will Falmouth be rough after lunch?
Which day is best for Oak Bluffs?

verdictCopy.go: Conditions are calm and well within this center console’s comfort zone — good to run.
verdictCopy.caution: Manageable but sporty — expect chop and spray. Trim down, slow in the sets, and brief the crew before you go.
verdictCopy.hold: Genuinely dangerous for a 23-ft center console. Stay on the mooring — this one is a hard no.

copy.heroLede: Start with a destination. Hartygang turns the live forecast into a route-specific trip call and a practical read on the ride home.
copy.askPlaceholder: Can we take the kids to Sampson's Island after lunch and still have a comfortable ride home?
copy.boatSectionTitle: Advice shaped for a 2024 EdgeWater 230 CC.
copy.boatSectionBody: Hartygang is a 2024 EdgeWater 230 CC — a 23-foot center console powered by a single 300 HP Yamaha outboard. Hartygang's day starts at the home dock inside Popponesset Bay — not at a generic Cape Cod waypoint. Every route begins at the home port, clears the local entrance, and weighs the exposed return leg back across Nantucket Sound.
copy.footerTag: Built for the next good day on Nantucket Sound.

safetyCards.title: Life jackets
safetyCards.body: Stowed in the console — in the compartment above the helm. There’s one for everyone aboard. If you’d feel more comfortable wearing one at any point, grab it; no one will bat an eye.

safetyCards.title: Radio
safetyCards.body: The VHF stays on Channel 16 — the hailing and distress channel monitored by the Coast Guard. That’s where we call for help if we ever need it.

safetyCards.title: Speak up
safetyCards.body: Ask questions and voice any concern — about the weather, the ride, feeling seasick, anything. Nothing is too small. A good day on the water is one where everyone feels comfortable saying something.
